notes.revenue: All money is an ESTIMATE = leadCount x 12500 (Rupees), not booked revenue.
notes.won: Closed-won deals are not in this feed; they live in the CRM Deals module.
notes.cubes: Cubes are pre-computed cross-tabs. Keys in bdByBrandAndMonth are 'BDid|Brand|YYYY-MM'. 'leads' counts all leads; rates use assigned only. Use these EXACT numbers; do not estimate.
